name: Round Stoneware Food Storage Container - Figmint™
description:
Keep leftovers, snacks and meals neatly stored away with the Round Stoneware Food Storage Container from Figmint™. Made from stoneware, this round container features a fluted base, while the snap-on lid and airtight seal help keep the contents fresh for longer. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, the container is also microwave safe without its lid.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
